quotes.text: The system isn’t broken. It was built this way.
Control is an illusion designed by those who fear chaos.
Every firewall is just a challenge waiting to be bypassed.
We stitch the fault lines of the world together with code, then watch the tapestry fray as soon as we step back.
We stare into the code like a preacher into a confession, trying to rewrite the sins of a world that never logged out.
